title: Enchantment inflicts 10 damage to the missed creature

card.rawText: If you miss your Hit Roll, play this card from your hand. Inflict 10 damage to the missed creature.

effect.value: If you miss your Hit Roll, play this card from your hand. Inflict 10 damage to the missed creature.

plan.title: Enchantment inflicts 10 damage to the missed creature
